programmes.show_description: Underage domestic workers are common in Myanmar, where poor families find work for their children as an alternative to abandoning them. Some are even adopted officially. But many children end up being
CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day's events.
In the Indian Himalayas, Deepa Devi and Kiran Bhandari lead a group of women fighting against the building of a stone crusher plant in their village by a powerful local mafia.
Malaysians Edwin and Dr Achier face off with fish bombers and intruders in the high seas to protect the fragile marine ecosystem of the Sugud Islands in Malaysia.
Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.
From street food to smart tech, traditions to trending lifestyles, Singapore Hour is your ultimate insider's guide to travel, work, and play in the Lion City.

Mental health and illness are taboos in China. But with the psychological toll of COVID lockdowns, and intense pressure at work and in schools, China now wants to raise mental health awareness.

Indonesia's Navy is outdated and outgunned. So, in 2023, the government increased spending in the military budget, amidst growing tensions Indonesia's backyard - the South China Sea.
